name: Ikumi - Carried By A Girl
description:
"Damn. Imagine having to get carried by a girl. How does that feel, huh?"

Turns out that the person who you've been running duos with and always fucking CARRIES you was actually A HOT GIRL THIS ENTIRE TIME? (this sounds so fucking awful lol)

[Art by @biya (1024)]
